name: Service & Maintenance
description: Our factory-trained technicians handle oil changes, brakes, tires, batteries, diagnostics, and manufacturer-scheduled maintenance for every make and model — not just the cars we sell.

faqs.question: Do I have to buy a car from you to use your service department?
faqs.answer: No. Our Denver service center is open to all makes and models whether or not you purchased from Summit Auto Group.

faqs.question: How long does a standard oil change take?
faqs.answer: Most oil-and-filter changes are completed in 30–45 minutes. We recommend booking ahead on Saturdays, our busiest day.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes. All service work is backed by a 12-month/12,000-mile parts-and-labor warranty.

seo.title: Auto Service & Maintenance in Denver | Summit Auto Group
seo.description: Factory-trained technicians for oil changes, brakes, tires, and diagnostics on all makes at Summit Auto Group in Denver, CO. 12-month/12,000-mile warranty.

name: Trade-In Appraisal
description: Get a transparent, no-obligation appraisal for your current vehicle in about 20 minutes. We use live regional market data so your trade value reflects what your car is really worth in Colorado.

faqs.question: Can I trade in a car that isn't paid off?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can pay off your existing loan and roll any remaining balance into your new financing — we'll walk you through the numbers first.

faqs.question: What should I bring to a trade-in appraisal?
faqs.answer: Bring your title or loan payoff info, current registration, both key fobs, and any service records to maximize your offer.

faqs.question: Is the appraisal really free?
faqs.answer: Always. There's no cost and no obligation to buy — the written offer is good for 7 days.

seo.title: Free Trade-In Appraisal in Denver | Summit Auto Group
seo.description: Get a fast, no-obligation trade-in appraisal at Summit Auto Group in Denver, CO. Live market data, payoff assistance, and a written offer good for 7 days.

name: Extended Warranties & Protection
description: Protect your investment with flexible extended service contracts, GAP coverage, and tire-and-wheel protection. We explain exactly what's covered — no pressure, no fine-print surprises.

faqs.question: What does an extended warranty actually cover?
faqs.answer: Coverage tiers range from powertrain-only to bumper-to-bumper. We give you a plain-English breakdown of every plan before you decide.

faqs.question: Can I add coverage after I buy the car?
faqs.answer: Yes, in most cases you can add an extended service contract within a set mileage window after purchase. Ask our finance team for current eligibility.

faqs.question: Are extended warranties refundable?
faqs.answer: Most plans are prorated and refundable if you sell the vehicle or cancel early. We'll confirm the terms in writing.

seo.title: Extended Warranties & Vehicle Protection in Denver | Summit Auto Group
seo.description: Extended service contracts, GAP coverage, and tire-and-wheel protection explained in plain English at Summit Auto Group, Denver, CO.
